transcript:
Speaker A: काय करतोस? [What are you doing?]
Speaker B: I... sleeping
Speaker A: I am sleeping, असं म्हणायचं. आणि थोडं formal म्हणायचं असेल तर, "I am getting some sleep" असंही म्हणू शकतोस. [Say "I am sleeping". And if you want to say it a bit formally, you can also say "I am getting some sleep".]
Speaker B: अरे वा! मग English कसं शिकायचं? [Oh wow! Then how to learn English?]
Speaker A: माझ्यासोबत दररोज फक्त १५ मिनिटं प्रॅक्टिस केलीस तर, फक्त एका महिन्यात तू confidently English बोलू शकतोस. [If you practice with me for just 15 minutes every day, you can speak English confidently in just one month.]
Speaker B: पण हे खूप महाग असेल ना? [But this must be very expensive, right?]
Speaker A: अजिबात नाही. फक्त १ रुपयात तू हा ॲप पूर्ण ट्राय करून पाहू शकतोस. ५० लाखांपेक्षा जास्त लोक माझ्यासोबत English शिकत आहेत. [Not at all. You can try this app fully for just 1 rupee. More than 50 lakh people are learning English with me.]
Speaker B: Wow! मग join कसं करायचं? [Wow! Then how to join?]
Speaker A: आत्ताच MySivi ॲप डाऊनलोड कर आणि English शिकायला सुरुवात कर. [Download the MySivi app right now and start learning English.]

summary: An AI avatar corrects a Marathi-speaking man's English grammar in a split-screen format. The AI explains that practicing for 15 minutes daily on the MySivi app can make him a confident speaker in a month. The ad highlights a special 3-day premium trial for just ₹1 and urges viewers to download the app.
